nasb.text: As for that night, let darkness seize it; Let it not rejoice among the days of the year; Let it not come into the number of the months.

esv.text: That night—let thick darkness seize it! Let it not rejoice among the days of the year; let it not come into the number of the months.

cnv.text: 願那夜被幽暗奪去， 不讓它連在平日之中，列入月數之內。

ccb.text: 愿那夜被幽暗吞噬， 不列在年日中， 不算在岁月里。
